critical_issues: C2: All Apply/Application CTAs link to #
C5: Dropdown navigation not keyboard accessible
C7: Student Portal utility link is dead
cross_agent_patterns: Apply/Portal CTAs don't work (flagged by 6 agents: all except CMS)
Program details missing (flagged by 4 agents: Prospective Student, Parent/Guardian, Faculty, Director)
Campus information sparse (flagged by 3 agents: Current Student, Parent/Guardian, Faculty)
Keyboard/accessibility broken (flagged by Designer + Accessibility with 9 critical/high issues)
Tuition & financial aid incomplete (flagged by 3 agents: Prospective Student, Parent/Guardian, Director)
Job outcomes/salary data missing (flagged by 4 agents: Prospective Student, Parent/Guardian, Director, CMS)
Program count accuracy (flagged by 2 agents: Director, CMS)
Consensus: Site is NOT launch-ready (all 8 agents agree)

partially_addressed: C4: Footer links now point to consumer-information.html (still missing actual compliance docs)
H7: Responsive fonts using clamp() function
M2: Mobile menu has aria-expanded attribute
M8: Accreditation section visible on About page
progress_since_last_review.new_findings: No new issues; all 42 issues from April 15 remain open. Focus between reviews was design refinement and page structure; content population deferred to Phase 2.

section_508_ada_violations: C5: Dropdown navigation not keyboard accessible
H13: Breadcrumb using text / instead of semantic markup

options: Option A (Recommended): Replace with 8 static category landing pages — easier maintenance, better SEO
Option B: Use Finalsite Marketplace plugin (if available)
Option C: Keep JavaScript filtering; requires developer for program updates (not scalable)
Option A (Recommended): Simplify to static hero image + text overlay
Option B: Use Finalsite native image rotation feature
Option C: Embed as custom code; requires QA testing in Composer
cms_decisions_pending.impact: Affects homepage hero section; maintenance burden on Composer

recommended_immediate_actions: Fix C5: Add :focus-within to dropdown nav (1 line CSS)
Fix C6: Add skip link to all page templates (5 lines HTML/CSS)
Fix H10: Add :focus-visible outline to buttons/links (5 lines CSS)
Fix H11: Add label to search input (2 lines HTML/CSS)
Fix H12: Add aria-hidden to icon elements (find/replace, 30 min)
Fix H13: Convert breadcrumbs to semantic structure (1 hour, 3 pages)
Fix M10: Add prefers-reduced-motion rule (8 lines CSS)
Wire C2 & C7: Replace # with real portal URLs (1 hour, pending URLs from IT)
phase_2_priorities: Populate program details for top 5-6 programs
Audit and fix program accuracy by campus
Add campus hours, parking, facility info
Add job outcomes and salary data
Complete tuition and financial aid rates
Build compliance pages and Accessibility Statement

timeline.immediate: Before Composer build (2-4 hours accessible fixes + 2 design decisions)

next_review.scope: Post-Phase 2 completion review; verify critical accessibility fixes, program details, campus info, tuition data populated
success_criteria: All C-level critical issues resolved or have working fix applied
H-level issues 80% resolved (program details, campus info, tuition, outcomes)
Accessibility audit passes on critical issues

metadata_notes: Review includes feedback from 8 distinct personas/roles. Strong consensus on critical issues. All prior issues from April 15 remain open; zero progress on content. Design/structure work completed; integration and content work pending.
